differential_diagnoses: Connective tissue disease-associated pulmonary arterial hypertension
next_steps: Genetic testing for EIF2AK4 mutations (associated with PVOD/PCH)
Surgical lung biopsy (if clinically stable enough, for definitive tissue diagnosis)
Consultation with a lung transplant center
Careful escalation of pulmonary vasodilator therapy with close monitoring for pulmonary edema
Bronchoalveolar lavage for cytology and cell counts
